intent_tree: {"开发一个Python程序，用于处理MP3文件并提取语音内容": {"选择MP3文件": {}, "检查音频质量": {}, "将语音转为文字": {"标记语音的开始和结束位置": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "使用tkinter库创建文件选择对话框以选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "调用pydub库加载并解析MP3文件以获取音频信息"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "检查音频文件的质量（时长、采样率、声道数等）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "验证语音识别模型是否存在，若不存在提示用户下载"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "通过vosk库初始化语音识别模型"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "将音频数据转换为适合语音识别的格式（如WAV）"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "逐段处理音频数据并提取语音内容"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "记录每段语音的时间戳（开始和结束位置）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "将提取的文字和时间戳保存为结构化数据（如JSON格式）"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "audioLoading"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "qualityCheck"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "modelValidation"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "audioConversion"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "segmentProcessing"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "timestampExtraction"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "dataSaving"}]}
